description:
Parent epic: V3 E13: Subagents and handoffs

Source task 3/5 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for missing child agent, failed child start, child interrupt,
  invalid return, forwarding modes, and handoff reset.

Epic closure criteria:
- delegation and ownership transfer are separate concepts in code and docs
- handoff routing works cleanly with sessions

comments.text: Audited subagent and handoff failure coverage. Added missing unloaded-child validation plus normalized handoff invalid-payload and failed auto-start coverage. Existing suite already covers child interrupt, invalid return, forwarding modes, and reset. Full gate passed.
